## 🔀 Restore the SDLC Flow

Copilot's magic has scrambled the Software Development Life Cycle diagram. Fix the `-->` connections so each phase flows to the correct next phase.

**Edit this comment** to restore the correct SDLC order:

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    Planning --> Design
    Design --> Requirements
    Requirements --> Deployment
    Deployment --> Implementation
    Implementation --> Maintenance
    Maintenance --> Testing
```
